title: Incorrect handling of post-decrement operation in `always_comb`

features.name: post_decrement_in_expression
features.description: Code should include a post-decrement operator (var--) used within an arithmetic expression inside a procedural block

features.name: post_decrement_preserves_original_value
features.description: Code should include a post-decrement operator where the original value is used in the surrounding expression before decrement occurs

features.name: variable_reuse_after_post_decrement
features.description: Code should include a post-decrement operator followed by a subsequent statement that reads the same variable to verify the decrement occurred
features.snippet: var_m2 = in_val; out_diff = (var_m2--) - sub_val; var_out = var_m2;
